description:
A first class OpenVPN client that lets you secure your network with ease & style.


added
Enhanced Settings window design on Windows 11
added
Enhanced main menu design
added
Connection performance and throughput improvements
added
Support for modern PKCS#11 URI scheme when specifying a token identity
improved
Main menu scrolling and mouse wheel support
improved
Dark mode improvements for the Settings window and connection editor
improved
Single adapter now renamed to match the active VPN connection
improved
Settings window responsiveness improved when using CPU rendering
improved
PKCS#11 certificates can now match on additional details
improved
PKCS#11 identity selection menu improved
improved
Support for CloudConnexa Device Identity Verification and Enforcement
updated
OpenVPN updated to version 2.6.21
updated
OpenSSL updated to version 3.5.7
fixed
Resolves issue where the menu may not reflect the updated order of sorted connections
fixed
Resolves PKCS#11 failing on reconnects after a token signing error has occurred
fixed
Resolves issue where DNS servers or domains sent via IPv6 RA may be ignored
fixed
Resolves DHCP failing if the connection has used static assignments previously
fixed
Resolves rare issue where DNS setup could stall for an extended period
fixed
Resolves issue where a pushed MTU may override a locally set value
fixed
Resolves a rejected TCP connection attempt not being immediately processed
fixed
Resolves failed TCP connection attempts ignoring a reconnect delay value
fixed
Resolves incorrect connection time after system time changes
fixed
Various bug fixes and enhancements
removed
Legacy OpenVPN TAP Adapter support removed
removed
Windows 10 version 21H1 and older are no longer supported
